Peter, we have a critical end-of-the-year fundraising deadline on Thursday. [Can you help us finish strong?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32533536:sSxH53yNr:m:1:958431888:A37C67758D6273D50DB64AD38F311164:r)
This finance report will be _**our final public filing before the New Hampshire Republican primary**_ and it's a very important opportunity to show the strength of our organization.
[If you're able to help our team with a $25, $50, $100 or more contribution right now](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32533536:sSxH53yNr:m:1:958431888:A37C67758D6273D50DB64AD38F311164:r), we'll be sure not to send you any more annoying fundraising emails this week!
**A recent poll of likely GOP voters in New Hampshire placed us at #3** \- **ahead of Cruz, Carson, Christie and Bush**.
With your help, we can ensure that we finish strong in New Hampshire and head into South Carolina, Nevada and the March primaries with significant momentum!

Thank you for all that you're doing to help us win!
**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio & Presidential Candidate

body:
Dear Patriot,
The end of the year is just days away and
this is a critical deadline for us.
It's the last fundraising deadline before the
Iowa Caucus.
We have experts in the field in Iowa and I'm
confident we can win the caucus, but I'm going to need your help
to fund our efforts and make a big statement.
My team put together an end-of-year moneybomb
to help get us through the next steps of this campaign. Please
watch my video explaining it:

A big fundraising turnout this month is
really critical to building momentum heading into 2016. I hope
you can chip in and show the media we're in it to win it.
We know I am the only one willing to take on
the status quo and stand up for liberty. We need to make sure our
fight continues stronger than ever in 2016.
We can win this thing. We just need your
help.
Your donation of any size will make a big
difference.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Ben Carson
subject: Help me close out 2015
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32534919:WuYtO3yNc:m:1:876315805:B87D9E2B7A957F16F6C3CCC21E945E67:r)
---

Peter,

It's been a tremendous year.

For a campaign that all the "experts" routinely dismissed, we've built a real movement.
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32534919:WuYtO3yNc:m:1:876315805:B87D9E2B7A957F16F6C3CCC21E945E67:r)
---
We've received over one million grassroots donations and consistently placed within the top tier of Republican presidential candidates.

Time and again, polls show us with the best chance of defeating Hillary Clinton.

**[Now it's time to close out 2015 in the strongest way possible. And I need your help. Today.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32534919:WuYtO3yNc:m:1:876315805:B87D9E2B7A957F16F6C3CCC21E945E67:r)**

Actual voting begins in just over a month, and everything we've been fighting for will come to a head.

To ensure that we hit all of our goals and have all the resources we need, we've begun a massive nationwide fundraising drive.

**[For the first 10,000 people to give $25 or more, we will send you an exclusive, limited-edition Ben Carson for President camo hat. Please go here to make a donation now. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32534919:WuYtO3yNc:m:1:876315805:B87D9E2B7A957F16F6C3CCC21E945E67:r)
**
We're running TV ads, recruiting and mobilizing our most likely supporters in early-voting states, and campaigning night and day. That is what your donation today will help to fund.

Thank you for joining me and helping to make this an incredible year.

[**I hope I can count on your support today as we work to close out 2015 in the strongest way possible.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32534919:WuYtO3yNc:m:1:876315805:B87D9E2B7A957F16F6C3CCC21E945E67:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| Friend,

I just got off an emergency call with my campaign manager and my finance director -- I'm running out of options.

You see: there are just a few hours until we close the books on December fundraising, **and I am still more than $400,000 dollars short** of what we need to raise BEFORE our Federal Election Commission (FEC) fundraising deadline on [December 31st.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)

I've asked my staff to put a clock below to show the amount of time left before my Federal Election Commission (FEC) fundraising deadline.

[ | | **FEC DEADLINE
COUNTDOWN**
---|---
](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r) Friend, I've also asked my campaign manager to put together a special, secure link so we can personally track those who step up at this critical time.

Will you click the link below and make a special contribution to stand in the FEC fundraising deadline gap?

**[CLICK HERE: STOP-GAP DONATION >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)**

Tomorrow my campaign manager will share with me who was able to step up at this critical time, and **I really hope to see your name on that list** BEFORE tomorrow morning.

Friend, I'm sure you've seen the latest polls. My campaign is surging -- not only nationally, but also in virtually every early primary state.

The only thing that can kill our momentum now will be coming up short on [December 31st.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)

So Friend, I'm personally asking: [**will you make a stop-gap donation of $35, $50, or $250 right now -- BEFORE the clock runs out?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)

After [December 31st](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r), EVERY presidential campaign must file financial reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) detailing our contributions and expenditures. Once results are made public, every media outlet will have immediate access and begin scrutinizing each candidate's report.

**It is of the utmost importance that I don't come up short.** Please use this special, secure link prepared especially for you:

**[CLICK HERE: STOP-GAP DONATION >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)**

We're building real momentum in key states, but we must keep the campaign doors open if we want to fight off the Washington Cartel.

Will you help me stay in this race?

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. I cannot overstate how important it is that we post strong fundraising numbers! [The reporting deadline is December 31st.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r) [**So please, make a contribution of $35, $50, or more immediately.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32539007:WqUjLJyNG:m:1:1104269936:3B245D465F8181D298EB6F2B8A0C4892:r)

name: Governor Ed Rendell
subject: Katie answered the call
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Dear Friend,

When I asked Katie McGinty to join my administration as Secretary of Environmental Protection, she didn't hesitate to answer the call. Katie had spent her entire career creating jobs, protecting our natural resources, and serving the public, and I knew that she was the right person for the job.

Now, Katie is answering the call to public service yet again - this time in response to the thousands of Pennsylvanians who want her to represent their families in the U.S. Senate.

I encouraged Katie to run because she's a problem solver who knows how to get things done. If we can get Katie to Washington, middle class Pennsylvanians will have a Senator who will not just fight for them, they'll have a Senator who will win those fights, ensuring that all of us have the best opportunities possible to pursue the American dream.

**Katie is facing her BIGGEST fundraising deadline of the year on December 31st, and she needs your help right now if she 's going to meet her goal of raising $10,000 in online, grassroots contributions.

[Can you pitch in just $5 to ensure she makes it? Make your grassroots contribution right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6198488997631623168/-5985825964007882752?refcode=e20151228&refcode2=e20151228nd&amount=5)**

There's no denying that times are hard. Families are working longer hours for lower pay, and they feel like no matter what they do, they can't seem to get ahead.

Katie will be exactly the Senator that we need advocating for us in Washington, putting our needs first and investing in good schools and good jobs once again. But Katie can't stand up for us in Washington unless we stand up with her right now, and that means making absolutely sure that she meets this critical end of year fundraising goal.

There's not much time left, and whether Katie goes into 2016 with the resources she needs to power this campaign is entirely dependent on what happens in the next 72 hours.

[**Katie needs to meet her $10,000 online goal before midnight on December 31st, and that means she needs you to make your $5 contribution to her campaign right now. Contribute your $5 here >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6198488997631623168/-5985825964007882752?refcode=e20151228&refcode2=e20151228nd&amount=5)

Thanks for answering the call,

Governor Ed Rendell
Chairman, Katie McGinty for Senate

But Katie can't stand up for us in Washington unless we stand up with her right now, and that means making absolutely sure that she meets this critical end of year fundraising goal. There's not much time left, and whether Katie goes into 2016 with the resources she needs to power this campaign is entirely dependent on what happens in the next 72 hours. Thanks for answering the call, Governor Ed Rendell Chairman, Katie McGinty for Senate | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: The most important deadline of the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When I first decided to run for president, my greatest fear was that if I were to run a poor campaign or did not do well, that it would be a setback not just for me, but for the ideas driving our campaign.
The corporate-owned media wrote us off. They said we had no chance of winning, that there was no way we could mobilize enough people to overcome the electoral influence of the billionaire class. The political establishment said victory was impossible.
But then **we** came along.
And in just a few months we've made history: we're rising in the polls, we have more volunteers than any campaign, and have received more individual contributions than anyone ever at this point in the Democratic primary. Let me assure you, the alarm bells are going off among the corrupt corporate class which is used to buying elections with little resistance.
But with a little more than one month before the Iowa caucuses, we face our biggest test of the entire campaign so far: our final official FEC fundraising deadline of the year.
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign before Thursday night 's FEC fundraising deadline and send an unmistakable message that you have had ENOUGH of the corrupt billionaire class buying our candidates and elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2857/43f17890/483baf35/62123f29/1997264711/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151228nd-full")
**[Donate $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2857/43f17890/483baf35/62123f29/1997264711/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151228nd-full")**
Our campaign is unlike the others. I am not for sale. I don't go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money. And even if I did, it'd go poorly. Let's just say that the corporate class is not very excited about the prospect of a President Bernie Sanders.
This is your movement. And your contribution goes **directly** toward paying for campaign staff who can train volunteers to knock on doors, make phone calls and spread the word about our campaign. That is why it is so important I ask.
Make a contribution today.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2857/43f17890/483baf35/62123ed7/1997264711/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). name: John Brabender, Chief Strategist
subject: Dead Wrong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| **Friend, they said we couldn’t do it!** Four years ago, on this very day, a poll was released showing Rick Santorum in last place in Iowa. Dead last.

And because I was Rick’s top campaign strategist, my phone was ringing off the hook with supporters calling to ask how this was possible. It was a fair question. Rick had been giving outstanding debate performances. He was the only candidate with substantial foreign policy experience. He was a national hero for defending life and marriage. He had successfully led the fight to overhaul the nation’s much-abused welfare program, moving people from dependence to work. Yet the polls leading up to Iowa were dominated by names like Bachman, Gingrich, and Cain. But just two weeks later, Rick won the Iowa caucus! Last week a new national poll was released that shows Rick within just a single point of six other candidates. What is our response to that? Well, the lesson we learned last time is that about 70% of Iowa caucus voters don't make a final decision about whom they are going to support until the final days before the caucus. Here’s even better news . . . with Rick Perry, Bobby Jindal, Scott Walker, and Lindsey Graham all now out of the race, Rick Santorum will finally be getting the national attention he deserves. And Rick’s record and vision are unmatched. I certainly would put them up against Trump's, Cruz's, or Rubio’s any day of the week. It’s moving time! We are about to take off. Voters are growing concerned about the candidates at the top of the polls, and they are beginning to look for a stable and serious candidate -- a candidate that is up to the task of being a strong Commander and Chief from day one. Rick Santorum is that candidate! **My Challenge To You** Here's the truth from inside the campaign: we need an immediate infusion of funds.

Without money now, we cannot leverage Rick's appeal to Iowa caucus-goers into the cold, hard votes we need to move ahead. We are at a critical point. We can capitalize on this Iowa opportunity or we can lose it, and what we are able to do depends on you.

[Please step up right now and contribute immediately. I don’t care if it’s just $10. Whatever you can give will help. ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=e80129e1361e7bc54bcc209161d059c4&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=1&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=1) **[Click here to make an online contribution conveniently.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=e80129e1361e7bc54bcc209161d059c4&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=2&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=2)** **
My Promise To You** I promise you that not only will your contribution make a huge difference, it will be spent very wisely.

All these Presidential candidates promise to run a smaller and more efficient government, yet they run their campaigns like wasteful big bureaucracies.

Not Rick Santorum. No charter planes or first class seats for him. And Chick-fil-A is the closest Rick ever gets to fine dining. Instead, we try to save every penny so that we have enough funds to run critical advertising, to get Rick’s conservative message and powerful vision to as many voters as possible. _**Simply put, it’s now or never.**_ ****Friend, a** re you with us?** Are you ready to make a contribution right here and right now?

**Are you ready to defeat ISIS, restore conservative values, and make America the land of the free again?** [Click here and help Rick Santorum change America.

](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=e80129e1361e7bc54bcc209161d059c4&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=3&test_email=1&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=3)Regards, John Brabender, Chief Strategist [http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=now_from_john&n=4)

name: George P. Bush
subject: The end of 2015
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend, sorry to email you so soon after Christmas, but this can't wait.

In 3 days, we're going to hit the single most important fundraising deadline of this campaign. It's not just the end of the month; it's not just the end of the quarter -- it's the end of the year and our very last public deadline before voting starts.

That's why I'm reaching out, Friend. **With only 3 days in 2015 we 're still $104,724 short of our $250,000 goal.**

[**So I need your help today. Please step up and contribute $100, $50, $25 or $5 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zwdjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcpszbr_jmqvvfns.html)

Remember, if you contribute before Thursday at midnight, your donation will be matched by a group of my dad's most generous donors.

**That 's right, Friend. Every dollar you contribute will be matched dollar for dollar, meaning it will go twice as far.**

No other fundraising deadline will be as scrutinized as this one. The media, the pundits, Hillary Clinton and the rest of the pack -- they'll be scrutinizing every detail of this report because it's our last chance to show that we have what it takes to win before voting begins.

**Friend , we need you today. Not tomorrow, not next year -- today. Can Dad count on you before 2016? If so, please show you're with him now and have your gift of $100, $50, $25 or $5 matched:**
[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mbbgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjynwtq_jmqvvfns.html)
Thanks for your support,

George P. Bush

subject: Making sure you didn't miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend, Did you see Governor Rendell's email from earlier today? He's exactly right that Katie needs _your_ help if she's going to meet her fundraising goal and have the resources she needs to mount a strong challenge in this election. Katie needs to raise $10,000 in grassroots contributions by midnight December 31st, and she's well on her way, but we can't stop now. **[Hurry in your $5 contribution to help Katie meet her goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3709391484928131072/-6777896548471668736?refcode=e20151228.2&refcode2=e20151228.2nd&amount=5)** Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
Katie McGinty for Senate

\--- Forwarded Message --- Dear Friend,

When I asked Katie McGinty to join my administration as Secretary of Environmental Protection, she didn't hesitate to answer the call. Katie had spent her entire career creating jobs, protecting our natural resources, and serving the public, and I knew that she was the right person for the job.

Now, Katie is answering the call to public service yet again - this time in response to the thousands of Pennsylvanians who want her to represent their families in the U.S. Senate.

I encouraged Katie to run because she's a problem solver who knows how to get things done. If we can get Katie to Washington, middle class Pennsylvanians will have a Senator who will not just fight for them, they'll have a Senator who will win those fights, ensuring that all of us have the best opportunities possible to pursue the American dream.

**Katie is facing her BIGGEST fundraising deadline of the year on December 31st, and she needs your help right now if she 's going to meet her goal of raising $10,000 in online, grassroots contributions.

[Can you pitch in just $5 to ensure she makes it? Make your grassroots contribution right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3709391484928131072/-6777896548471668736?refcode=e20151228.2&refcode2=e20151228.2nd&amount=5)**

There's no denying that times are hard. Families are working longer hours for lower pay, and they feel like no matter what they do, they can't seem to get ahead.

Katie will be exactly the Senator that we need advocating for us in Washington, putting our needs first and investing in good schools and good jobs once again. But Katie can't stand up for us in Washington unless we stand up with her right now, and that means making absolutely sure that she meets this critical end of year fundraising goal.

There's not much time left, and whether Katie goes into 2016 with the resources she needs to power this campaign is entirely dependent on what happens in the next 72 hours.

[**Katie needs to meet her $10,000 online goal before midnight on December 31st, and that means she needs you to make your $5 contribution to her campaign right now. Contribute your $5 here >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3709391484928131072/-6777896548471668736?refcode=e20151228.2&refcode2=e20151228.2nd&amount=5)

Thanks for answering the call,

Governor Ed Rendell
Chairman, Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Politics at Best and Worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

With the end of the year fast approaching, I want to thank you for all your help and support during 2015. Events this year are strong reminders that human beings have the capacity to work together for the common good -- and the capacity to do great evil.

The Paris agreement on Climate Change was a historic first step that showed we can take collective action to protect the planet from a common threat.

At the same time, the continuing atrocities committed by ISIS show that the global community must work together to stop and reverse their malignant, extremist, evil ideology.

**Here at home we must speak out against the ugly voices that seek to further their political ambitions by exploiting legitimate concerns about ISIS. ** _Donald Trump and others engaged in the divisive politics of fear remind us how demagogues try to scare a country into abandoning its values and, in the process, undermine our greatest strength.

These different responses to global challenges -- unity of purpose versus demagoguery -- show the stakes are very high as we enter 2016. The political choices we make are in our own hands. **And the kind of country and world we will live in will depend on the choices we make. **_ That is why I want to thank you for taking seriously your responsibilities as a citizen and your participation in this democratic process. I am sorry that these requests so often take the form of asking for financial help, **but -- at this very moment -- an outside SuperPac is spending a million dollars on Baltimore area TV and media trying to defeat us.[That is why I need your help more than ever as 2015 comes to a close. Please give what you can before our critical FEC deadline. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c01/70cdc2ba/47bb9840/396490b/1200650545/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+That+is+why+I+need+your+help+more+than+e&utm_campaign=em122815_1&source=em122815_1")** I appreciate all your understanding, and your generous support as, together, we wage this fight for the future direction of our state, our country and our world.

Many thanks, and all the best,

Chris
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c01/70cdc2ba/47bb9840/3964908/1200650545/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em122815_1&source=em122815_1")

---

---

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Two things you should know about Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Friend -
Last week, Hillary Clinton's campaign manager told supporters that our campaign could raise more money than theirs this month. He said the race was close and warned that Bernie could very well win in Iowa and New Hampshire.
Can our unprecedented number of grassroots supporters raise more money from small-dollar donations than Hillary Clinton has from high-dollar events? We have no idea. **But it is very important that we push ourselves to try.**
If everyone steps up before Thursday's official FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers will send two unmistakably important messages about Bernie Sanders and our campaign: that we can win, and that we can do it without begging millionaires and billionaires for money.
[**It is very important that you make a $3 contribution to our campaign before Thursday night 's official FEC fundraising deadline, the final and most important one of 2015.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122942/1320537673/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151228pm-full")
The title of the Clinton campaign's message to supporters was "Two things you should know about Bernie Sanders." Well, here are two things we think everyone should know about Bernie Sanders:
1\. **Bernie Sanders is the candidate of everyday people, not the wealthy.** We've received more than 2.3 million individual contributions and counting, averaging less than $30 apiece. That's more than any candidate in history at this point in a campaign for president. You should be very proud of that.
2\. **The primary is close and Bernie is the strongest general election candidate.** According to the most recent polls, we are ahead in New Hampshire and are closing the gap in Iowa. We have a chance to win in both states and are working day and night to make that happen. Not only that, but a number of independent polls show Bernie fares better in many of the general election match-ups against Republicans.
Want to make sure we don't end up with President Trump? Want to elect Democrats up and down the ballot? Bernie is our best chance. And the best thing you can do right now to ensure he's the Democratic Party nominee is make a contribution ahead of our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year:
[**Make a $3 contribution to help fund our political revolution 's victories in Iowa, New Hampshire and beyond.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122942/1320537673/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151228pm-full")
We're getting pretty close to making some final budget decisions before the first votes. Your contribution today will ensure we have the resources to compete and win.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122942/1320537673/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151228pm-full")

** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122943/1320537673/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122940/1320537673/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/62122941/1320537673/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb285c/43f17890/480270c4/6212294e/1320537673/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Trump Campaign Field Director, Dena Espenscheid
subject: The Trump Campaign Needs Your Immediate Response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter,

**Merry Christmas! Happy Holidays!**
The MidAtlantic Trump Team wishes you and yours all the best.
While, many of you are in full holiday celebration mode, we are working hard to Make America Great Again! We wanted to touch base with a campaign update.
**1\. Campaign Communication**
If you have not done so already, please visit [www.DonaldJTrump.com/Volunteer](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.DonaldJTrump.com%2FVolunteer&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=1) to tell us exactly how you are willing to support Mr. Trump’s efforts to win the Republican Primary. Soon, only people who have filled out this form may hear from us regularly.
**2\. Voter Registration**
Make sure you are registered to vote as a Republican (where applicable). The deadlines are fast approaching. Details on each of the MidAtlantic states are here:
**District of Columbia**
* **Deadline: December 31, 2015**
* Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican)
* Website: [https://www.dcboee.org/voter_info/reg_status/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dcboee.org%2Fvoter_info%2Freg_status%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=2)
* Convention Date: March 12

**Maryland**
* Deadline: April 5, 2015
* Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican)
* Website: [http://www.elections.state.md.us/voter_registration/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.elections.state.md.us%2Fvoter_registration%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=3)
* Primary Date: April 26

**Virginia**
* Deadline: February 8, 2016
* Party Registration: None
* Website: [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=4)
* Primary Date: March 1

**West Virginia**
* Deadline: April 19, 2016
* Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican)
* Website: [https://ovr.sos.wv.gov/Register](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fovr.sos.wv.gov%2FRegister&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=5)
* Primary Date: May 15

**3\. Volunteer Phone Banking**
Volunteer to get out the vote for Donald Trump. We have the ability for people to phone bank from home. Group phone banks opportunities resume in Virginia next week and will start in the other states in the upcoming weeks. If you are willing to phone bank from home, e-mail [MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com) now. Send your name and phone number. Our team will follow up with e-mail instructions.
**4\. Used Computers & Tablets**
If you have an unused computer or tablet we need it! Consider donating it or loaning it to the Trump Campaign. We can use these items in our phone banks. E-mail [MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com) to initiate the offer.
This election is as historic as it is important. We can not Make American Great Again without your votes and support. Tell us your volunteer preferences at [www.DonaldJTrump.com/Volunteers](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.DonaldJTrump.com%2FVolunteers&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_12_28&n=6), make sure you are registered to vote, and let us know if/when you are able to phone bank from home.
It is going to be a great new year!
Dena Espenscheid
Field Director, MidAtlantic Region
Donald J. Trump for President

clean_body: Peter, Merry Christmas! Happy Holidays! The MidAtlantic Trump Team wishes you and yours all the best. While, many of you are in full holiday celebration mode, we are working hard to Make America Great Again! We wanted to touch base with a campaign update. 1\. Campaign Communication If you have not done so already, please visit to tell us exactly how you are willing to support Mr. Trump’s efforts to win the Republican Primary. Soon, only people who have filled out this form may hear from us regularly. 2\. Voter Registration Make sure you are registered to vote as a Republican (where applicable). The deadlines are fast approaching. Details on each of the MidAtlantic states are here: District of Columbia Deadline: December 31, 2015 Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican) Website: Convention Date: March 12 Maryland Deadline: April 5, 2015 Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican) Website: Primary Date: April 26 Virginia Deadline: February 8, 2016 Party Registration: None Website: Primary Date: March 1 West Virginia Deadline: April 19, 2016 Party Registration: Mandatory (Republican) Website: Primary Date: May 15 3\. Volunteer Phone Banking Volunteer to get out the vote for Donald Trump. We have the ability for people to phone bank from home. Group phone banks opportunities resume in Virginia next week and will start in the other states in the upcoming weeks. If you are willing to phone bank from home, e-mail mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com now. Send your name and phone number. Our team will follow up with e-mail instructions. 4\. Used Computers & Tablets If you have an unused computer or tablet we need it! Consider donating it or loaning it to the Trump Campaign. We can use these items in our phone banks. E-mail mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com to initiate the offer. This election is as historic as it is important. We can not Make American Great Again without your votes and support. Tell us your volunteer preferences at , make sure you are registered to vote, and let us know if/when you are able to phone bank from home. It is going to be a great new year! Dena Espenscheid Field Director, MidAtlantic Region Donald J. Trump for President Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. \--- Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. · United States
